title: Hollow Knight
description: Hollow Knight Minecraft Fully Playable Map
body:
## **This is the full playable Hollow Knight Map Experience inside of Minecraft!**
This package includes a full non-offical playable recreation of Hollow Knight with the first 3 areas including.
- Kings Pass
- Dirtmouth
- Forgotten Crossroads

This map has _3 Boss Fights_, as well as _16 types of enemies_ to find around the map!
There are also _4 shops_ and many charms you can find around as well!

## Map Credits:
- [Clouser](https://www.youtube.com/c/C1OUS3R): Coding/Building/Resources/Sfx
- [NoteBlockMatt](https://www.youtube.com/@NoteBlockMatt): Music/Sfx
- [MortimerKerman](https://mortimer-kerman.github.io/): Coding
- [AshIsReal](https://twitter.com/Ash_is_real): Resources
- [Zammyz](https://twitter.com/Zammyzammyzammy): Building

_Hollow Knight is the copyright of Team Cherry. (teamcherry.com.au) (hollowknight.com) 'Hollow Knight' the name and logo are trademarks of Team Cherry._
